reviews.text: The burger was tasteless and missing item
Pretty decent burger, the bun was fresh and patties well cooked. Would have preferred a little more sauce in the burger and some grilled onions
Generous portions on loaded fries, chicken in burgers crispy and full of flavour
do not buy smash burgers from here they are not smash burgers! they are over done small beef patties that are not cooked to order. by patty are inedible rock hard!
now confirmed to be my favourite burger spot in walthamstow/Leyton/leytonstone
